changes: Added OPERATOR role (4-role model). Day-to-day ops (increaseSupply, toggleSale, toggleTicketType, addTicketType, setTypeURI/setTokenURI/updateBaseURI/setURI) now callable by owner OR operator. Operator defaults to platformSigner so non-web3 organizers can click buttons in dashboard; backend relays tx. Sovereign actions (transferOwnership, cancelEvent, endEvent, setPlatform, setMintSigner, setOperator) remain owner-only.

configuration.payments: All payments via GembaPay (contracts are payment-agnostic)
